normalization_point: Kia-style hybrid localization is Stage 2 evidence; Green waits for OPM/FCF and tariff absorption.
SDV delay and capex hike are RedTeam gates, not software rerating evidence.
European price competition can defend revenue while capping margin.
Hyundai Mobis-style restructuring is Stage 2; Green waits for deal finality, OPM, FCF, and clean quality cost.
Auto-component quality or recall evidence is a Green-blocking overlay.
CJ Logistics-style repeat contract can become Green-capable only after unit price, OPM/FCF, automation, and labor costs confirm.
Logistics volume is capped when labor/regulation cost can erase OPM.
Tourism policy can move prices, but Green waits for spend, drop, RevPAR, and OPM/FCF.
Casino evidence can be Green-capable only when return visitors and unit economics confirm.
Airline safety accidents and inspections are hard 4C gates.
Korea shipping can be a strong cycle, but structural Green is heavily restricted.
Parcel volume only matters when unit price, unit cost, automation payback, and OPM/FCF improve.
Travel-agency policy rallies stay Stage 1/2 until package ASP, departures, and OPM confirm.
R9 disclosure confidence is capped when contract, freight, casino drop, OPM, or unit-economics detail is missing.
